seoTitle: Wayville vs Webb Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wayville and Webb Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wayville vs Webb Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wayville and Webb Beach.
heading: Wayville vs Webb Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wayville, South Australia and Webb Beach, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Webb Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Wayville (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wayville or Webb Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wayville has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Webb Beach scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wayville scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Webb Beach scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wayville or Webb Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Webb Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
